steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure around the blank
steps.content: Left: He typically (subject + adverb). Right: them from black ash and sweetgrass (object + prepositional phrase). The blank must be the main verb of this independent clause, and it must match the third-person singular subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: A main verb must be finite and agree with the subject in person and number. For He (third-person singular) in simple present tense, the form is weaves. Options A, C, and D are non-finite forms that don't conjugate to match the subject. That matches choice B — B is correct.
